[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A dark-themed game interface displays a “LEVEL UP!” header along with a user profile and level progress details in a centered panel.  

Main Subject:  
A circular avatar placeholder on the left shows a light gray circle with two white oval-like shapes inside. To the right, a “LEVEL 8” button-style card appears next to an “EXPERIENCE 5 / 450” card, with a horizontal progress bar beneath them. Below the bar are three small stat boxes labeled “MESSAGES 507,” “XP NEEDED 445,” and “NEXT LVL 9.”  

Setting:  
The image is a digital UI screenshot on a dark purple/blue background with a large rounded rectangle panel centered on screen. There is no visible outdoor or real-world environment, and lighting is entirely graphic, with highlighted text and colored bars.  

Visual Details:  
The top reads “LEVEL UP!” in bright yellow/gold text with small decorative diamond shapes on each side. The main panel has rounded corners and a subtle border. The “LEVEL 8” card is purple, while the “EXPERIENCE 5 / 450” card is teal-green. The progress bar is a long dark bar with a small colored segment at the left and a “1%” label aligned to the right of the bar. Colors used include dark navy, purple accents, teal accents, and yellow/gold for the header, with white text for most labels and numbers. The camera angle is straight-on and the composition is symmetrical around the centered panel.  

Visible Text:  
LEVEL UP!  
qilaa  
#3  
LEVEL PROGRESS  
LEVEL  
8  
EXPERIENCE  
5 / 450  
1%  
MESSAGES  
507  
XP NEEDED  
445  
NEXT LVL  
9  
Congratulations on leveling up!  

Practical Summary:  
This image shows a video game or app level-up screen with a profile name and level progress information. It displays current level, experience toward the next level, and related stats like messages, XP needed, and the next level number.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
